---
title: "Precalculus"
subtitle: "No. 48 (Dec. 2018)"
format: html
toc: false
---
## Introduction
This file was generated using R code.

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
library(gt)

metadata <- read_csv("../contents_raw.csv")
output <- metadata |>
mutate(v = str_sub(issue, 5, 6)) |>
filter(v == 48) |>
t()
cn <- metadata |>
  colnames()

tibble(cn, head(output, n=-1)) |>
  gt() |>
  cols_align(align = "left") |>
  tab_style(
    style= cell_text(v_align = "top"),
    locations = cells_body()
  ) |>
  tab_options( table.width = "80%", column_labels.hidden = TRUE)
```
